lecture_summary: Fifth lecture of Eagar's TQI module. Continues from prior session on theory of constraints (TOC), pivots through Six Sigma certification, just-in-time inventory, agile/one-of-a-kind manufacturing, 3D printing critique, the Memory Jogger TQM toolkit, fishbone/Ishikawa diagrams, and closes with a sustained meditation on leadership (drawing from Eagar's 'Leadership, Management and Education' faculty newsletter article) centered on respect for all contributors. Next two lectures will be delivered by Brian Hohmann and Steve Lyons while Eagar is away.
